architecture_summary: Add SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptHandoff as a pure Foundation Mode contract above TemporalSchedulerReceipt and DistributedLeaseExecutionReceipt. The handoff binds scheduler, distributed lease execution, worker mesh, worker failure, and UAO receipt refs into future worker runtime receipt obligations while denying scheduler dispatch, runtime dispatch, worker invocation, scheduler mutation, lease backend calls, adapter backend calls, external network, filesystem writes, connector authority, terminal closure, and success claims. A deterministic validator checks schema identity, source refs, admission gates, runtime witness refs, denied-until refs, future worker obligations, admission guards, no-effect result flags, receipt refs, and summary counts.
data_model_changes: add SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptHandoff schema for source receipt refs, authority scope, scheduler worker contract, admission guards, result flags, receipt refs, summary counts, governance refs, and receipt envelope
add Foundation Mode handoff example that records no live dispatch, no worker invocation, no backend call, no filesystem write, no connector call, no terminal closure, and no success claim

add deterministic validator for schema artifact checks, top-level ref checks, authority denial checks, contract ref checks, admission guard checks, result flag checks, receipt ref checks, and summary count checks
rollback_plan: Remove SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptHandoff schema, Foundation example, validator, focused tests, protocol manifest entry, protocol document rule/count updates, proof coverage matrix surface and generated fixture/doc changes, and SDLC evidence artifacts, then rerun schema validation, protocol manifest validation, public repository surface validation, proof coverage matrix validation, focused handoff tests, SDLC artifact validation, security review validation, release readiness validation, and workspace governance preflight.
migration_plan: No persistence, credential, scheduler, worker, distributed lease backend, deployment, external endpoint, or runtime route migration is required. The change adds a local deterministic handoff contract and validator only.
